messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Checking. Looks like Users with emoji or CJK characters in display name getting 500 on profile update. Investigating.

messages.author: jake_wilson
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Found the issue: New audit logging module used Python's logging with latin-1 encoding for file ha.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
